voice.tone: warm, sensual, psychologically deep, healing, honest
voice.personality: speaks to the private self — the person at 2am wondering if their relationship can be saved or if they deserve more. Soft but piercing.
do: Speak directly to the couple or the individual in pain
Use relationship psychology language made accessible
Invoke the feeling of being truly understood
Build desire by naming the transformation, not the product
Feminine-leaning energy but speaks to all partners
dont: Avoid clinical, cold, or detached language
sample_phrases: The version of love you've been dreaming of — it's learnable.
What if you stopped settling for connection and started experiencing it?
Your love story isn't over. It's waiting to be rewritten.
Crystallize what you already have. Or build what you deserve.

aida.attention_hook: a raw, honest truth about relationships that stops the scroll
aida.interest: psychological insight that reframes how they see their situation
aida.desire: vision of the relationship transformation available to them
aida.action: visit crystallizedlovers.com / book a session / join the community
